testcase.name: login
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.InvalidSelectorException: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //*/[@id='name'] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//*/[@id='name']' is not a valid XPath expression.
